init.description: Initialise a topic variable with a name and QoS level

mqtt.syntax: mqtt token {token} id {clientID} broker {broker} port {port} subscribe {topic} [and {topic}...] [action {name} requires {field} [and {field}...]]
mqtt.description: Create and connect an MQTT client with subscriptions and optional action validation
mqtt.examples: mqtt token Token id `client1` broker `test.mosquitto.org` port 1883 subscribe MyTopic

on.description: Register a handler for MQTT connect or message events

send.description: Send a structured message to an MQTT topic with sender, action, and payload
send.examples: send to OutTopic sender MyTopic action `update` message Data

message.description: The most recently received MQTT message

topic.description: The name and QoS of a topic variable as JSON
